---
title: "Business Insider"
page-layout: article
---

# Business Insider

## Description

Digital news platform featuring reporting on business, technology, finance, careers, and global affairs. Useful for tracking companies, industries, labor markets, and emerging business trends.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-business-insider)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
